_meta.description: Micro-interactions — form states, button feedback, input focus, custom checkboxes, scroll indicator, toast notifications
_meta.usage: Kopirati CSS/JS snippete. Svaki mood ima prilagođene focus i hover stilove.

form_inputs.note: Input stilovi per mood. Primijeniti na input, textarea, select.

brutalist.default: border: 2px solid var(--text); border-radius: 0; padding: 12px 16px; background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 1rem; width: 100%; transition: none; outline: none;

neobrutalism.default: border: 2px solid var(--text); border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; background: white; color: var(--text); box-shadow: 3px 3px 0 var(--text); width: 100%; transition: box-shadow 0.1s, transform 0.1s; outline: none;
neobrutalism.focus: box-shadow: 5px 5px 0 var(--primary); transform: translate(-1px, -1px); border-color: var(--primary);

glassmorphism.default: border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-radius: 12px; padding: 13px 16px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); color: var(--text); width: 100%; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; outline: none;

luxury-dark.default: border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,169,110,0.3); border-radius: 0; padding: 12px 0; background: transparent; color: var(--text); letter-spacing: 0.5px; width: 100%; transition: border-color 0.3s; outline: none;

editorial.default: border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 0; padding: 10px 0; background: transparent; color: var(--text); font-family: var(--font-body); width: 100%; transition: border-color 0.2s; outline: none;

neon-cyberpunk.default: border: 1px solid rgba(0,245,255,0.2); border-radius: 4px; padding: 12px 16px; background: rgba(0,245,255,0.03); color: var(--text); font-family: var(--font-body); width: 100%; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; outline: none;
neon-cyberpunk.focus: border-color: var(--primary); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--primary-glow), inset 0 0 10px var(--primary-glow);

earth-organic.default: border: 2px solid rgba(74,124,89,0.2); border-radius: 16px; padding: 13px 20px; background: var(--surface); color: var(--text); width: 100%; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; outline: none;

pastel-soft.default: border: 2px solid rgba(192,132,252,0.2); border-radius: 16px; padding: 13px 20px; background: var(--surface); color: var(--text); width: 100%; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s, transform 0.2s; outline: none;
pastel-soft.focus: border-color: var(--primary); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(192,132,252,0.15); transform: scale(1.01);

swiss-minimal.default: border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 0; padding: 12px 16px; background: var(--surface); color: var(--text); width: 100%; transition: border-color 0.15s; outline: none;

dark-tech.default: border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; background: var(--surface); color: var(--text); width: 100%; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; outline: none;

button_press.note: Dodati na sve .btn klase za fizički press osjećaj
button_press.css: .btn:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .btn-neo:active { transform: translate(2px, 2px); box-shadow: 2px 2px 0 var(--text) !important; }

custom_checkbox.note: Za cookie consent i form checkboxe. Per mood stil.
custom_checkbox.css_base: .custom-check { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; cursor: pointer; user-select: none; } .custom-check input.sr-only { position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0,0,0,0); } .checkmark { width: 20px; height: 20px; border: 2px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: transparent; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; flex-shrink: 0; } input:checked + .checkmark { background: var(--primary); border-color: var(--primary); } input:checked + .checkmark::after { content: ''; width: 5px; height: 9px; border-right: 2px solid white; border-bottom: 2px solid white; transform: rotate(45deg) translate(-1px, -1px); display: block; } input:focus-visible + .checkmark { outline: 2px solid var(--primary); outline-offset: 2px; }

focus_visible.note: OBAVEZNO na svakom sajtu — WCAG AA. Zamijeniti outline: none sa focus-visible.

scroll_indicator.note: Progress bar na vrhu stranice koji pokazuje scroll poziciju.
scroll_indicator.css: .scroll-progress { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; height: 3px; background: var(--primary); width: 0%; z-index: 9999; transition: width 0.1s; }
scroll_indicator.js: window.addEventListener('scroll', function() { const scrolled = (window.scrollY / (document.documentElement.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight)) * 100; document.getElementById('scrollProgress').style.width = scrolled + '%'; });

shrink.css: .navbar { transition: padding 0.3s, background 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s; } .navbar.scrolled { padding-top: 8px !important; padding-bottom: 8px !important; background: var(--bg) !important; box-shadow: 0 2px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); }

hide_on_scroll_down.js: let lastScroll = 0; window.addEventListener('scroll', function() { const current = window.scrollY; document.querySelector('.navbar').classList.toggle('hidden', current > lastScroll && current > 100); lastScroll = current; });

toast_notification.note: Za form success/error feedback. Reusable za CMS admin panele.
toast_notification.css: .toast { position: fixed; bottom: 24px; right: 24px; padding: 14px 20px; border-radius: var(--radius); font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600; z-index: 9999; transform: translateY(20px); opacity: 0; transition: transform 0.3s, opacity 0.3s; max-width: 320px; } .toast.show { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; } .toast-success { background: #22c55e; color: white; } .toast-error { background: #ef4444; color: white; } .toast-info { background: var(--primary); color: white; }

skeleton.note: Za dinamički loaded sadržaj — bolje od spinnera.
skeleton.css: .skeleton { background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--surface) 25%, var(--surface-alt, rgba(0,0,0,0.05)) 50%, var(--surface) 75%); background-size: 200% 100%; animation: skeleton-wave 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; border-radius: var(--radius); } @keyframes skeleton-wave { 0% { background-position: 200% 0; } 100% { background-position: -200% 0; } }

spinner.css: .spinner { width: 24px; height: 24px; border: 2px solid var(--border); border-top-color: var(--primary); border-radius: 50%; animation: spin 0.7s linear infinite; } @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

whatsapp_float.note: Floating WhatsApp dugme — dodaje se za svaki lokalni biznis sajt
whatsapp_float.css: .whatsapp-float { position: fixed; bottom: 24px; right: 24px; width: 56px; height: 56px; background: #25D366; color: white; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(37,211,102,0.4); z-index: 1000; transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .whatsapp-float:hover { transform: scale(1.1); box-shadow: 0 6px 25px rgba(37,211,102,0.5); }
